title: 1-on-1 Joe and Michael
summary: Joe and Michael discussed CRM strategy alignment, leadership approach to Vinnie, sales pipeline discrepancies, and Vinnie's communication style. Michael is now leading the CRM project. They will present a unified leadership recommendation for the CRM design to Vinnie and strategize how to manage Vinnie's communication style.

decisions.description: Michael Donovan is now leading the CRM project.
Present a unified leadership approach and recommendation for the CRM design to Vinnie.
Joe will schedule a recurring weekly meeting to maintain momentum on the CRM project, with the first kickoff meeting outlining project objectives before the call with Zoho.
Michael Donovan will prepare CRM documentation and discuss the Zoho Sales IQ feature with Jason before their joint meeting.

actionItems.task: Reconcile June's data and perform a 90-day review of ad spend.

expectedOutcome.description: Analysis of ad spend and performance metrics.

actionItems.task: Outline the objectives for the CRM project kickoff meeting.

expectedOutcome.description: Document outlining CRM project goals and deliverables.

actionItems.task: Set up a meeting with Michael Donovan and Jason for Tuesday or Wednesday next week to kickoff the CRM project and define the workflow.

expectedOutcome.description: Scheduled meeting with Michael and Jason.

actionItems.task: Put Zoho Sales IQ documentation together and discuss it with Jason on a call before the 12:30 call.

expectedOutcome.description: Documentation outlining Zoho Sales IQ functionality.

actionItems.task: Review and clean up the format of the CRM documentation and share it with Joe Furnari and Jason.

expectedOutcome.description: Formatted CRM documentation shared with relevant stakeholders.

actionItems.task: Have a conversation with Vinnie regarding bonus payments and concerns about job security.

expectedOutcome.description: Resolution of concerns about bonus payments and job security.

tensions: Joe's concern about not being fully aligned with Jason on the CRM strategy.
Jason's defensiveness and disagreement with Michael's points.
Michael's frustration over past marketing issues and the performance of Honest SEO.
Michael's concern about Vinnie's aggressive communication style and job threats.
Michael's frustration with the manual lead source report and its impact on bonus payments.
Disagreement about appropriate level of process and simplicity for the CRM.
referencesToPast: Mention of previous points made by Michael Donovan that Jason disagreed with.
Reference to a marketing standup meeting on May 20th.
Mention of previous conversation about Honest SEO being a revenue source.
Reference to a sales call/pipeline call on Monday.
Discussion of leads brought up last week.
The YouTube video view counts and the performance of Honest SEO (mentioned in the summary).
